positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for platypus_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    platypus != human).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~has_teeth(sK1)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~platypus(X0) | ~has_teeth(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    has_teeth(sK0)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    platypus(sK1)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define mammal(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define human(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define reptile(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for platypus_neg
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u14,axiom,
    platypus != human).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define mammal(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define has_teeth(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define platypus(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define human(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define reptile(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
